sections.paragraph:
ἐϰλογή, ῆς, ἡ [ἐκλέγω]

—1. ‘act of making a choice or selection’, in our lit. of God’s unique independent choice Ro 9:11; 11:5, 28; 1 Th 1:4; 2 Pt 1:10. σκεῦος ἐϰλογῆς chosen instrument/agent Ac 9:15.

—2. by metonymy, in pass. sense: ‘beneficiary of selection’, chosen (= οἱ ἐϰλεϰτοί God’s chosen ones) Ro 11:7.
